ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patient_vitals" (
  "time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the vital signs were recorded */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  "ndv" INTEGER /* Normalized Stroke Volume */,
  "dv" REAL /* Doppler Velocity */,
  "evid" INTEGER /* Event Identification */,
  "mdv" INTEGER /* Medication Device Volume */,
  "amt" INTEGER /* Amount of medication administered */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that recorded the vitals */,
  "vital_source" TEXT /* Source of the vital data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "vital_status" TEXT /* Status of the vital data (e.g., normal, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time", "patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_vitals_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number where the patient is located */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of patient admission */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of patient discharge */,
  "primary_diagnosis" TEXT /* Primary diagnosis of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient involved in the event */,
  "event_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., arrhythmia, hypotension) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that detected the event */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* Source of the event detection (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage_form" TEXT /* Form in which the medication is administered (e.g., tablet, injection) */,
  "standard_dosage" REAL /* Standard dosage amount */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the medication */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the medication */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions required for the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medication_administration" (
  "administration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administration event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient receiving the medication */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medication administered */,
  "administered_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the medication was administered */,
  "administered_dosage" REAL /* Amount of medication administered */,
  "administration_route" TEXT /* Route of administration (e.g., oral, intravenous) */,
  "administration_site" TEXT /* Site of administration (e.g., arm, leg) */,
  "administration_status" TEXT /* Status of the administration (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medication_administration_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medication_administration_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("medication_id") REFERENCES medications ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., EKG, blood pressure monitor) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the device within the hospital */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "warranty_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the device's warranty expires */,
  "calibration_due_date" TEXT /* Date the next calibration is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device involved in the log */,
  "log_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., device startup, maintenance performed) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., maintenance, error, info) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log (e.g., device, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., nurse, doctor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the staff member works in */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was terminated */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member's supervisor */,
  "training_completed" TEXT /* List of training programs completed by the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being responded to */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member responding to the event */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the response occurred */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the staff member */,
  "response_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the response (in minutes) */,
  "response_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the response (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "response_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_responses_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_responses_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
